query:
SELECT 
  p.productSku,
  COUNT(pv.id) as total_variants,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pv.isDefault = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as default_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pv.isDefault = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_default_count
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.productId = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.productSku
ORDER BY total_variants DESC;
